statements.impact_statement: Sample disposition, replace with real entries. This plugin has no runtime dependency tree (it is a markdown/JSON skill bundle), so scanners (Semgrep, Gitleaks/TruffleHog, Trivy, OSV-Scanner) are expected to find little to nothing here. Disposition real findings here as they're triaged, so the release gate enforces "no undispositioned high/critical findings" rather than "zero findings".
